name: Windows Event Logs Deletion Detected
description: Detection of Windows Event Log deletion. This could be an attempt by an adversary to erase evidence of their activities, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a **Windows Event Log Deletion** event was detected. The event ID **{event_id}** indicates that one or more event logs were cleared. This activity is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1070.001**) and is often a sign of an adversary attempting to cover their tracks. The action was performed under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to understand what activity the adversary might be trying to hide.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows event ID (1102 or 1104) indicating log deletion.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the log deletion.
